subcodes.title: Words spoken at Kinney home in New York, 1912-12-01
subcodes.first_line: I desire to go to the Orient... Know this for a certainty that today, the penetrative power in the arteries of the world of humanity, is the power of the Covenant.
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @firmness in the Covenant
